attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER           
,WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
,WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT
,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
, WNAGL.LINE_ID
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WNADC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_GET_LINES WNAGL
ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNAGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER         = WNAGL.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER     
AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE               = WNAGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           = WNAGL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
WHERE
WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
AND EXISTS (	SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X
				WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WNAGL.LINE_ID 
				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
			/*	AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' */
                )
UNION ALL
SELECT
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER           
,WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
,WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT
,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
, WNAGL.LINE_ID
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WNADC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_GET_LINES WNAGL
ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNAGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER         = WNAGL.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER     
AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE               = WNAGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           = WNAGL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
WHERE
WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
AND COALESCE(WNAGL.LINE_ID,-1) > 0
AND NOT EXISTS (	SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X
				WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WNAGL.LINE_ID 
				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' 
			/*	AND END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' */
                )

SELECT 
WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY,
SUM(	COALESCE(
					CASE	WHEN	NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'CREDIT' THEN NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT 		
							ELSE 	NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  
					END
				,0)
	) AS LINE_EXT_AMOUNT ,
	
SUM(	COALESCE(
					CASE 	WHEN 	NATTL.TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE           = 'CREDIT' THEN NATTL.RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT           
							ELSE 	NATTL.RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT       
					END
				,0) 
		+ 
		COALESCE(
					CASE 	WHEN 	NATFL.FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE       = 'CREDIT' THEN NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT       
							ELSE 	NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT   
					END
				,0)
	) AS TAX_FREIGHT_AMT
FROM	
(SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_EXP
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ORDER BY AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ) = 1)  WNADC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
	ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL
	ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
GROUP BY WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY

SELECT 
'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
NULL AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
NULL AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
 CAST(
CASE WHEN ABS(WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT) >  ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT) AND WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT <> 0 THEN
	CAST((
	(
	
	(CASE WHEN WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT < 0 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) *
			(ABS(WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) - 
			CAST( (ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT) * (CASE WHEN WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
	)
	)
	* WNADC.EXTENDED_AMOUNT
	)   AS DECIMAL(26,7))/ 
	((CASE WHEN WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) * WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT )
ELSE 0
END 
AS DECIMAL(26,7))
ACCTD_AMOUNT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
WNADC.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
WNADC.AR_TYPE_CD                     AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
CAST(
CASE WHEN ABS(WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT) >  ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT) AND WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT <> 0 THEN
	CAST((((CASE WHEN WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT < 0 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) * (ABS(WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT) - ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT))) * WNADC.EXTENDED_AMOUNT) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/ WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT
ELSE 0
END 
AS DECIMAL(26,7))
AMOUNT,
1 AS BATCH_ID,
NULL AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
NULL AS COGS_PERCENT,
NULL AS COMMENTS,
WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT AS CONTEXT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
1 AS CREATED_BY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
WNADC.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT  AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WNASCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
NULL AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT	,
'AR_ADJUSTMENT' AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
WNADC.FISCAL_ID AS FISCAL_ID,
'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 			AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
WNADC.GL_DATE AS GL_DATE,
WNADC.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
NULL AS GROUPING_ID ,
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT	 AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
NULL AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
NULL AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
NULL AS LINE_PERCENT,
SC_TV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT  AS LINE_SEQ_ID 	,	
NULL AS LINE_TYPE,
NULL AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
CASE 	WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD ='O' THEN SSO_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
		ELSE NULL
END AS ORDER_HEADER_ID , 
CASE	WHEN 	WNGL.LINE_ID = -9999 	THEN 
				CASE	WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' THEN SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT
						ELSE NULL
				END
		ELSE WNGL.LINE_ID
END AS ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER AS ORDER_NUMBER   ,
WNADC.ORG_ID AS ORG_ID,
NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
ESCT.QUOTA_FLAG	 AS QUOTA_FLAG , 
NULL AS REASON_CODE,
NULL AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
NULL AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
CASE	WHEN WNADC.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL ELSE 999 END  AS REQUEST_ID,
NULL AS RULE_START_DATE,
SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,  
SC_TV.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT AS  SALESREP_ID , 
NULL AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
NULL AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
WNASCF.SOURCE_TYPE  AS SOURCE_TYPE , 
SC_TV.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,  
SC_TV.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT  AS TERRITORY_ID , 
/* CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , */
CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE  THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , 
'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE, 
NULL AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  , 
WNADC.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS TRX_DATE,
NULL AS TRX_NAME,
WNADC.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER AS TRX_NUMBER,
WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE AS TRX_TYPE,
NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
'AR_ADJUSTMENT' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
SAAT.AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_KEY
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WNADC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON WNADC.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_SLS_CRE_FLG WNASCF
ON WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = WNASCF.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER
AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNASCF.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNASCF.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNASCF.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_AMOUNT WNAA
ON WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY = WNAA.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX SAAT
ON SAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT = WNADC.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
AND SAAT.SS_CD = WNADC.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_GET_LINES WNGL 
ON WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = WNGL.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER
AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNGL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           = WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNADC.GL_DATE
AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
	ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNADC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
	ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL
	ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON NP.ITEM_KEY = WNADC.PRODUCT_KEY 
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  SC_TV 
	ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  WNASCF.LINE_ID 
	AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = WNASCF.SOURCE_TYPE 
	AND SC_TV.SS_CD = 	NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
	/*AND CAST(SC_TV.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC
  ON SC_TV.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT = NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
  AND SC_TV.SS_CD = NSOL_SC.SS_CODE
  AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC
	ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
	on ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT
	AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
	ON WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  
	AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE  	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
	ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
/* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD
	ON WNADC.FISCAL_ID = EAMPD.FISCAL_ID
*/	
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
	ON 	WNADC.FISCAL_ID	= NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT	
WHERE
1=1
AND  WNASCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N'
and AMOUNT <>0

SELECT
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER           
,WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
,WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT
,CASE WHEN WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END SOURCE_TYPE
, 'N' METRIX_FLAG
,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WNADC
WHERE
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_SLS_CRE_FLG Y 
                                     WHERE WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = Y.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = Y.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = Y.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                                     AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	 )

SELECT DISTINCT  
	NAAT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER, 
	NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE, 
	NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CODE, 
	NAAT.GL_DATE, 
	NAAT.GL_POSTED_DATE, 
	NAAT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE, 
	NAAT.TRANSACTION_DATETIME, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
	NAAT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE, 
	NAAT.AR_TRX_KEY, 
	NAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT, 
	NAAT.SS_SOURCE_APPLICATION_CODE, 
	NAAT.SS_CODE, 
	NAAT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
	NAAT.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
	NAAT.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	NAAT.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
	NAAT.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_ITEM_USD_AMT, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_ITEM_TRXL_AMT, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FREIGHT_USD_AMT, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FREIGHT_TRXL_AMT, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TAX_USD_AMT, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TAX_TRXN_AMT, 
	NAAT.AR_TYPE_CD, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_USD_AMT, 
	NAAT.AR_ADJUSTMENT_STATUS_CD 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WI
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON WI.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX NAAT
	ON NAAT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = WI.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER
	AND NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WI.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WI.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	
WHERE 
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_ITM EXI
		WHERE EXI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT                      
			AND EXI.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		)			
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_FRT EXF
			WHERE EXF.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT              
			AND EXF.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		)			
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_TAX EXT
			WHERE  EXT.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT              
			AND EXT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		)	
/*OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES_ASN EXA
			WHERE  EXA.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WI.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT              
			AND EXA.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
		) */

SELECT 
'REV' AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
ENGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
NULL AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,
NULL AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
CAST(
CASE WHEN ABS(WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT) >  ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT) AND WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT <> 0 THEN
	CAST((
	(
	
	(CASE WHEN WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT < 0 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) *
			(ABS(WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) - 
			CAST( (ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT) * (CASE WHEN WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END)) AS DECIMAL(26,7))
	)
	)
	* WNADC.EXTENDED_AMOUNT
	)   AS DECIMAL(26,7))/ 
	((CASE WHEN WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) * WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT )
ELSE 0
END 
AS DECIMAL(26,7))
ACCTD_AMOUNT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
WNADC.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
WNADC.AR_TYPE_CD                     AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
CAST(
CASE WHEN ABS(WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT) >  ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT) AND WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT <> 0 THEN
	CAST((((CASE WHEN WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT < 0 THEN -1 ELSE 1 END) * (ABS(WNADC.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT) - ABS(WNAA.TAX_FREIGHT_AMT))) * WNADC.EXTENDED_AMOUNT) AS DECIMAL(26,7))/ WNAA.LINE_EXT_AMOUNT
ELSE 0
END 
AS DECIMAL(26,7))
AMOUNT,
1 AS BATCH_ID,
NULL AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
NULL AS COGS_PERCENT,
NULL AS COMMENTS,
WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT AS CONTEXT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
1 AS CREATED_BY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATION_DATE,
WNADC.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT  AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WNASCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
NULL AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT	,
'AR_ADJUSTMENT' AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
WNADC.FISCAL_ID AS FISCAL_ID,
'F' AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 			AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
WNADC.GL_DATE AS GL_DATE,
WNADC.GL_POSTED_DATE AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME AS GLOBAL_NAME,
NULL AS GROUPING_ID, 
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT	 AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
NULL AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
NULL AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
1 AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
'Y' AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
NULL AS LINE_PERCENT,
NULL AS LINE_SEQ_ID 	,	
NULL AS LINE_TYPE,
NULL AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
NULL AS ORDER_HEADER_ID , 
WNGL.LINE_ID AS ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
WNGL.ORDER_NUMBER AS ORDER_NUMBER   ,
WNADC.ORG_ID AS ORG_ID,
NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NULL AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
'Y' AS QUOTA_FLAG , 
NULL AS REASON_CODE,
NULL AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
NULL AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
CASE	WHEN WNADC.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL ELSE 999 END  AS REQUEST_ID,
NULL AS RULE_START_DATE,
COALESCE(ESCT_INIT_VAR.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID,0) AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,  
CASE	WHEN WNASCF.METRIX_FLAG ='Y' THEN COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_ID,0) 
		ELSE COALESCE(ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_ID,0)	
END		AS  SALESREP_ID , 
NULL AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
NULL AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
WNASCF.SOURCE_TYPE AS SOURCE_TYPE , 
100 AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,  
COALESCE(EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_ID,0) AS TERRITORY_ID , 
/* CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , */
CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE  THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE CAST ( NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) END AS TRANSACTION_DATE , 
'O' AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE, 
NULL AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  , 
WNADC.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS TRX_DATE,
NULL AS TRX_NAME,
WNADC.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER AS TRX_NUMBER,
WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE AS TRX_TYPE,
NULL AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
NULL AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
'AR_ADJUSTMENT' AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
SAAT.AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_KEY
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WNADC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON WNADC.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_SLS_CRE_FLG WNASCF
ON WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = WNASCF.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER
AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNASCF.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNASCF.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNASCF.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_AMOUNT WNAA
ON WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY = WNAA.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX SAAT
ON SAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT = WNADC.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
AND SAAT.SS_CD = WNADC.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_GET_LINES WNGL 
ON WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = WNGL.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER
AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNGL.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNGL.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNGL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNADC.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           = WNADC.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNADC.GL_DATE
AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
	ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNADC.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
	ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL
	ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON NP.ITEM_KEY = WNADC.PRODUCT_KEY 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR
	on ESCT_INIT_VAR.NAME  = 'Direct Sales'
	AND ESCT_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_IF              
	ON ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'FSO Metrix Invoice'	
	AND ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_I              
	ON ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'MISC. U.S.'	
	AND ESP_INIT_VAR_I.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR             
	ON EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_NAME   = 'MISC. U.S.'	
	AND EST_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 	
/* INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD
	ON WNADC.FISCAL_ID = EAMPD.FISCAL_ID
*/	
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM 
	ON 	WNADC.FISCAL_ID	= NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT	
WHERE
1=1
AND  WNASCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'Y'
and AMOUNT <>0

SELECT
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER       ,       
WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE      ,         
WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,
WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
	ELSE 
	    CASE WHEN EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID <= 0 OR EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID IS NULL THEN 
		       CASE WHEN WNADC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNADC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
		   ELSE EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID END
	END AS LINE_ID,

CASE WHEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
	ELSE
		/* COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) : RCHETTRI */
		CASE WHEN WNADC.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
	END AS ORDER_NUMBER
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WNADC
/* satchinn : LOT2B Modifications
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN NAATLA
ON NAATLA.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = WNADC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND NAATLA.SS_CODE = WNADC.SS_CODE 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  */
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON  WNADC.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_ORD_LN EORCTLOL
ON EORCTLOL.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = WNADC.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
AND EORCTLOL.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EORCTLOL.ORDER_LINE_ID
AND NSOL.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON WNADC.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY

SELECT
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER           
,WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
,WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT
,'C'  SOURCE_TYPE
, NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WNADC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE
WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'
AND EXISTS (	SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
				WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT  =  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'C' 
			/*	AND CAST(END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01' */
			)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_SLS_CRE_FLG Y 
                                     WHERE WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = Y.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = Y.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = Y.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                                     AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	 )

SELECT
NAAT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER              
,NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CODE        
,NAAT.GL_DATE                       
,NAAT.GL_POSTED_DATE                
,NAAT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE   
,NAAT.TRANSACTION_DATETIME          
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,NAAT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE           
,NAAT.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,NAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT          
,NAAT.SS_SOURCE_APPLICATION_CODE    
,NAAT.SS_CODE                       
,NAAT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_ITEM_USD_AMT       
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_ITEM_TRXL_AMT      
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FREIGHT_USD_AMT    
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FREIGHT_TRXL_AMT   
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TAX_USD_AMT        
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TAX_TRXN_AMT       
,NAAT.AR_TYPE_CD                    
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_USD_AMT            
,NAAT.AR_ADJUSTMENT_STATUS_CD       
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME
,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY         
,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY       
,NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'CREDIT' THEN NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT                    ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  END LINE_EXT_AMOUNT
,CASE WHEN NATTL.TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE           = 'CREDIT' THEN NATTL.RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT           ELSE NATTL.RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT       END TAX_EXT_AMOUNT
,CASE WHEN NATFL.FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE       = 'CREDIT' THEN NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT       ELSE NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT   END FREIGHT_EXT_AMOUNT
,EAMPD.FISCAL_ID
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX NAAT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                ON NAAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX                 SMADJ   
                ON NAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT = SMADJ.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
   AND NAAT.SS_CODE = SMADJ.SS_CD
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
                ON NAAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
                ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
                ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
                ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
                ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL
                ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE NAAT.GL_DATE BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE 
AND NAAT.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
AND NAAT.AR_TYPE_CD IN ('INVOICE','LINE')
AND NAAT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE = 'AR'                         
AND NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN ('CM-GLOBAL REBATE','WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) /* ADDED TWO WebEx FILTERS FOR Q1FY14 RELEASE*/ /*added 'ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX'*/
/*kguvvala:Added for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/
AND NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL  ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%') /* COMMENTED 'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'.. ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
AND NAAT.SS_CODE IN('QTC','BV')
AND   NOT EXISTS  
               ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR    
                 WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SMADJ.AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY  
    AND DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                
                AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='AR_ADJUSTMENT'
                 )
   AND  NOT EXISTS 
                ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB  
                 WHERE DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SMADJ.AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
     AND DRVDB.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
                 AND DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='AR_ADJUSTMENT'
                 )
     
/* --- */
UNION 
SELECT
NAAT.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER              
,NAAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,NAAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY           
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CODE        
,NAAT.GL_DATE                       
,NAAT.GL_POSTED_DATE                
,NAAT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE   
,NAAT.TRANSACTION_DATETIME          
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT     
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,NAAT.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE           
,NAAT.AR_TRX_KEY                    
,NAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT          
,NAAT.SS_SOURCE_APPLICATION_CODE    
,NAAT.SS_CODE                       
,NAAT.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY    
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_ITEM_USD_AMT       
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_ITEM_TRXL_AMT      
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FREIGHT_USD_AMT    
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_FREIGHT_TRXL_AMT   
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TAX_USD_AMT        
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_TAX_TRXN_AMT       
,NAAT.AR_TYPE_CD                    
,NAAT.AR_ADJ_TRX_USD_AMT            
,NAAT.AR_ADJUSTMENT_STATUS_CD       
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME
,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY         
,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY       
,NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'CREDIT' THEN NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT                    ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  END LINE_EXT_AMOUNT
,CASE WHEN NATTL.TAX_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE           = 'CREDIT' THEN NATTL.RU_TAX_CREDIT_AMOUNT           ELSE NATTL.RU_TAX_DEBIT_AMOUNT       END TAX_EXT_AMOUNT
,CASE WHEN NATFL.FREIGHT_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE       = 'CREDIT' THEN NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_CREDIT_AMOUNT       ELSE NATFL.RU_FREIGHT_DEBIT_AMOUNT   END FREIGHT_EXT_AMOUNT
,NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT as FISCAL_ID
FROM /* $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD, */
$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM, 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_NCR_AR_DATA_EXP  NAAT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
                ON NAAT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TRX                 SMADJ   
                ON NAAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT = SMADJ.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
   AND NAAT.SS_CODE = SMADJ.SS_CD
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
                ON NAAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS
                ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
                ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
                ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
                ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_FREIGHT_LINE NATFL
                ON NATFL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TAX_LINE NATTL
                ON NATTL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE NAAT.GL_DATE BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
AND NAAT.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
AND NAAT.AR_TYPE_CD IN ('INVOICE','LINE')
AND NAAT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE = 'AR'                         
AND NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT IN ('CM-GLOBAL REBATE','WEBEX','SALES ADJUSTMENTS-WEBEX','ICMS-ADJ-WEBEX' /*,'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'*/) /* ADDED TWO WebEx FILTERS FOR Q1FY14 RELEASE*/
/*kguvvala:Added for XAAS as part of Q2FY15*/
AND NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME NOT LIKE ALL ('XAAS%','ICMS-XAAS%') /* COMMENTED 'XAAS','ICMS-XAAS'.. ADDED AS PART OF Q1FY19 CE-BRAZIL*/
AND NAAT.SS_CODE IN('QTC','BV')
AND   NOT EXISTS  
               ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_REV DRVDR    
                 WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SMADJ.AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY  
    AND DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY                
                AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='AR_ADJUSTMENT'
                 )
   AND  NOT EXISTS 
                ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG DRVDB  
                 WHERE DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = SMADJ.AR_ADJUSTMENT_KEY
     AND DRVDB.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
                 AND DRVDB.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='AR_ADJUSTMENT'
                 )

SELECT
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER           
,WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
,WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT
,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
, NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB .WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WNADC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNADC.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE
WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM')
AND EXISTS (	SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
				WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT  =  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
			/*	AND CAST(END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'  */
			)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_SLS_CRE_FLG Y 
                                     WHERE WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = Y.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = Y.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = Y.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                                     AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	 )

SELECT
WNADE.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER              
,WNADE.BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,WNADE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
,EOUGC.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE   
,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER
,NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME               
,WNADE.AR_TYPE_CD              
,COALESCE(WNADE.AR_ADJ_TRX_REASON_CODE,NAATY.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_NAME) AS REASON_CODE
,WNADE.AR_ADJ_TRX_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT  
,WNADE.AR_ADJ_TRX_FUNCTIONAL_AMT  
,COALESCE(WNADE.GL_DATE,DATE)   AS GL_DATE
,WNADE.GL_POSTED_DATE
,WNADE.AR_TRX_KEY
,WNADE.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY
,WNADE.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE         
,NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE
,NAT.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY  AS SHIP_TO_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY
,NAT.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY
,NAT.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY          
,NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE        
,NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE           
,NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE     
,NULL AS HEADER_CONTEXT
,WNADE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADE.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'CREDIT' THEN NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT  END EXTENDED_AMOUNT
,WNADE.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE
,NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY
,WNADE.SS_CODE
, NULL AS RMA_FLAG
,WNADE.SK_ADJUSTMENT_ID_INT
,WNADE.FISCAL_ID
,EOUGC.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
,WNADE.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_EXP WNADE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON WNADE.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON WNADE.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY  EOUGC
	ON NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE= EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
	AND NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY       
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE NAATY
	ON (WNADE.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE = NAATY.BK_AR_ADJ_TYPE_CODE
	/* AND NAATY.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE  rchettri  : ss-Cd join incorrect */
	AND NAATY.BK_COMPANY_CODE = EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NAATY.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA
	ON WNADE.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
	ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNADE.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNADE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
	ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME

WHERE
WNADE.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE   = 'LINE'

SELECT
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER           
,WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
,WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT
,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
, NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WNADC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE
WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'DM'
AND EXISTS (	SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X 
				WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT  =  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
			/*	AND CAST(END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01' */
			)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_SLS_CRE_FLG Y 
                                     WHERE WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = Y.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = Y.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = Y.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                                     AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	 )

SELECT
WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER           
,WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE              
,WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
,WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNADC.HEADER_CONTEXT
,'I'  SOURCE_TYPE
, NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_DATA_CUR WNADC
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE
WNADC.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV'
AND EXISTS (	SELECT 1 FROM  $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP  X
				WHERE X.EP_SOURCE_LINE_ID_INT =  NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
				AND X.SS_CD = NATL.SS_CODE
				AND X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'I' 
		/*		AND CAST(END_TV_DTM AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'  */
				)
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_AR_SLS_CRE_FLG Y 
                                     WHERE WNADC.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER = Y.BK_AR_ADJ_NUMBER 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_COMPANY_CODE = Y.BK_COMPANY_CODE 
                                     AND WNADC.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = Y.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
                                     AND WNADC.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY	 )
